# Blue Tape Sites
> Precision web design for contractors and home-service businesses across Orange County, Los Angeles County, the Inland Empire, and San Diego County. Call (714) 515-6909.

## Services
https://bluetapesites.com/pricing — Clear web design pricing for contractors and home-service businesses. New builds, redesigns, and monthly support without agency fog.
https://bluetapesites.com/service-area — Blue Tape Sites serves contractors and home-service businesses across Orange County, Los Angeles, the Inland Empire, and San Diego County.
https://bluetapesites.com/audit — Get a free 5-minute contractor website audit showing what hurts trust, conversions, mobile clarity, and local search visibility.
https://bluetapesites.com/process — A clear contractor website design process from audit to launch: inspect, rewrite, rebuild, revise, and launch without drift.
https://bluetapesites.com/examples — See example website directions for plumbers, electricians, cleaners, remodelers, and other contractors that need more calls.
https://bluetapesites.com/about — Blue Tape Sites is a Southern California web design studio for contractors and home-service businesses that need more trust and calls.
https://bluetapesites.com/contact — Contact Blue Tape Sites for contractor web design, website redesigns, monthly support, and free website audits.

## Industries
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-plumbers — Blue Tape Sites builds plumbing websites that turn urgency into clearer trust, stronger mobile calls, and more confident service requests.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-remodelers — Blue Tape Sites designs remodeler websites that pre-sell craftsmanship, strengthen project presentation, and attract better-fit renovation inquiries.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-hvac — HVAC website design built for service calls, installs, seasonal demand, financing clarity, and stronger mobile trust.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-electricians — Electrician website design with sharper credential framing, residential and commercial paths, and cleaner service hierarchy.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-cleaners — Cleaning company website design for recurring clients, crew trust, polished proof, and clearer quote requests.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-roofers — Roofing website design for storm-season demand, financing, warranty trust, insurance claim help, and high-ticket jobs.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-landscapers — Landscaping website design for design-build, maintenance, editorial project galleries, and better consultation requests.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-contractors — Contractor website design built for trust, mobile clarity, service-area relevance, and more qualified calls.
https://bluetapesites.com/web-design-for-garage-door — Garage door website design for repair urgency, installation consideration, brand clarity, and cleaner service requests.
